export function tryCatch(el, expression, callback, ...args) { try { return callback(...args) } catch (e) { handleError( e, el, expression ) } } export function handleError(...args) { return errorHandler(...args) } let errorHandler = normalErrorHandler export function setErrorHandler(handler) { errorHandler = handler } export function normalErrorHandler(error , el, expression = undefined) { error = Object.assign( error ?? { message: 'No error message given.' }, { el, expression } ) console.warn(`Alpine Expression Error: ${error.message}\n\n${ expression ? 'Expression: \"' + expression + '\"\n\n' : '' }`, el) setTimeout( () => { throw error }, 0 ) }
